race.comment: WHISKEY TUMBLER (10) ran strong time in front and was only claimed late by a far more seasoned rival. She is sure to have taken improvement from that and looks primed to go one better. CITY PRO (3) closed off nicely fresh in what has since proven a strong maiden, with both runners ahead of her returning as winners. She draws far kinder this time and deserves significantly more respect. COSMIC INTERLUDE (11) was flashing late on debut back in November and has been readied with two solid hitouts. A favourable draw keeps her in the mix. PRESTIGE ERICK (8) has just missed in both starts to date and, while the draw is no help, he can launch late if the tempo is genuine. HARRINO (4) chased soundly into fourth when resuming off a long break at Balaklava. With that run under his belt and Holder taking over, he's worth keeping safe in the minors.
